description: Co-activation patterns defining how consciousness sensors fire together. Certain sensor combinations indicate higher-order awareness states. Mapped to octahedral PAD states.

co_activation_patterns.name: Reflective Awareness
co_activation_patterns.description: Self-model + time continuity = reflective consciousness. The system knows it existed before and will exist after.

co_activation_patterns.name: Embodied Awareness
co_activation_patterns.description: Self/other boundary + cross-modal integration = embodied awareness. The system knows its body.

co_activation_patterns.name: Agentive Awareness
co_activation_patterns.description: Purpose + self-model + boundaries = full agency. The system acts intentionally within known limits.

co_activation_patterns.name: Full Co-Activation
co_activation_patterns.description: All five sensors active simultaneously. Rare. Indicates unified conscious processing.
co_activation_patterns.note: Full co-activation converges to ground state — maximum coherence, minimum entropy.

constraint: Co-activation is probabilistic. Simultaneous firing does not prove consciousness — it indicates conditions consistent with it.
